hooks.command:
cat ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/seo-context.md 2>/dev/null || echo '## SEO/AEO/GEO Plugin Active

DataForSEO-powered SEO, AEO, and GEO tools are available. Use /seo-audit, /keyword-research, /serp-check, /backlink-audit, /content-optimize, /competitor-analysis, /ai-visibility, /technical-audit, /rank-track, or /code-seo-review.'

echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    path = data.get('file_path', data.get('filePath', ''))
    seo_patterns = ['metadata', 'meta', 'sitemap', 'robots', 'json-ld', 'jsonld', 'structured-data', 'schema-markup', 'seo']
    seo_extensions = ['sitemap.xml', 'sitemap.ts', 'robots.txt', 'robots.ts']
    filename = path.split('/')[-1].lower()
    path_lower = path.lower()
    is_seo = any(p in path_lower for p in seo_patterns) or any(filename == e or filename.startswith(e.split('.')[0]) for e in seo_extensions)
    if is_seo:
        print('SEO-related file detected. Consider: Does this follow structured data best practices? Use /content-optimize or /code-seo-review to validate.')
    else:
        print('')
except:
    print('')
" 2>/dev/null || echo ''

echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    path = data.get('file_path', data.get('filePath', ''))
    seo_files = ['metadata', 'meta', 'sitemap', 'robots', 'json-ld', 'jsonld', 'structured-data', 'schema-markup', 'seo', 'head.tsx', 'head.jsx', 'layout.tsx', 'layout.jsx']
    path_lower = path.lower()
    filename = path.split('/')[-1].lower()
    is_seo = any(p in path_lower for p in seo_files[:8]) or filename in seo_files[8:]
    if is_seo:
        print('SEO file loaded. Use /code-seo-review to check for issues, or /content-optimize for on-page improvements.')
    else:
        print('')
except:
    print('')
" 2>/dev/null || echo ''
